productDisplayName: Salvatore Ferragamo Women Incanto Shine Perfume
description: Style NoteCreated by Karine Dubreuil, Incanto Shine by salvatore ferragamo is a fruity floral fragrance, in a colourful and pretty bottle adorned with summery floral motifs. It includes fresh notes of pineapple, bergamot, passion fruit, pink peony, cedar, amber, musk and peach. Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
